nasb.text: He will not escape from darkness; The flame will wither his shoots, And by the breath of His mouth he will go away.

esv.text: he will not depart from darkness; the flame will dry up his shoots, and by the breath of his mouth he will depart.

cnv.text: 他不能離開黑暗， 火燄必燒乾他的嫩枝， 他必因　神口中的氣而離去。

ccb.text: 他无法逃脱黑暗， 火焰要烧焦他的嫩枝， 上帝口中的气要毁灭他。
